case_title: MILAGROS F RODRIGUEZ VS. JOHN CONTRERAS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY RODRIGUEZ, MILAGROS F AS TO DEFENDANT CONTRERAS, JOHN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-05-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
